sentences.arabic: لَيَالِي رَمَضَانَ مُخْتَلِفَةٌ عَنْ بَقِيَّةِ اللَّيَالِي.
sentences.translation: Ramazanske noći su drugačije od ostalih noći.
sentences.translationEn: Ramadan nights are different from other nights.

sentences.arabic: تَبْقَى المَسَاجِدُ مَفْتُوحَةً حَتَّى وَقْتٍ مُتَأَخِّرٍ.

sentences.translation: Ljudi izlaze u šetnju nakon iftara.
sentences.translationEn: People go for a walk after iftar.

sentences.translation: Tržnice su osvjetljene i ukrašene u Ramazanu.
sentences.translationEn: Markets are lit up and decorated during Ramadan.
